scope: Sanitized identity, accepted historical Auto-Scan, owner-attested Gateway Installation List and UI-observation intake for Audi MMI 3G High HNAV baseline HNAV-8T1035664F-K0257-D1.
privacyNotes: No full VIN, plate, customer data, private path, access code, serial number, coding value, WSC, VCID, proprietary URL or binary package is included.

items.name: 5F diagnostic controller identification
items.notes: The supplied Auto-Scan captures 5F part number, hardware identifier, component and software level for its recorded session.

items.name: Owner-accepted historical full Auto-Scan context
items.notes: The owner confirmed the supplied diagnostic files as authentic and accurate. The record is time-bounded to its capture session; no re-scan is required to validate this evidence.

items.name: Owner-accepted Gateway Installation List reconstructed from photographed VCDS screens
items.requiredBefore: Installed-versus-possible address and infotainment dependency review
items.notes: The owner confirmed the three supplied screenshot pages and the complete address 01-8C transcription as accurate. A native export is not required for evidence acceptance. Checkbox state does not prove physical hardware presence.

items.name: Owner-attested Red Engineering Menu identification
items.notes: The owner accepted the visible readings HNav_EU_K0257_5_D1, Variant 9307, RadioUnit 9471, MU 0187 and Sample d1. No re-capture is required.

items.name: Owner-attested Green Menu structure observation
items.notes: The visible structure and listed menu entries are accepted as captured observations. Visibility does not confirm function.

items.name: Owner-attested Green Menu diagnostic display observations
items.notes: The displayed strings are accepted as captured. Their root cause and technical meaning are not promoted.

items.name: Owner-attested Green Menu NADPhone display observation
items.notes: The displayed $ERROR$ value is accepted as captured. Cause and module interpretation remain unknown.

items.name: Owner-accepted historical DTC context
items.notes: DTCs extracted from the supplied scans are accepted as time-bounded captured observations. Their root cause is not confirmed.

items.name: Auto-Scan sanitization and provenance review
items.notes: Records selection, exclusions, privacy review and source limitations.

items.name: Owner source and transcription attestation
items.requiredBefore: Acceptance of supplied private files and screenshot transcriptions
items.notes: Supersedes prior re-capture and re-export requirements for the accepted source observations.

items.name: 5F coding backup
items.notes: Not required to accept existing evidence. Required only as a rollback/safety control before future write-capable work.

items.name: 5F read-only adaptation map
items.notes: Not required to accept existing evidence. Required only before adaptation-specific analysis or write-capable work.

items.name: Dataset and recovery backup
items.requiredBefore: Any dataset, parameterization, EEPROM, HDD or SWDL experiment
items.notes: Binary packages, access material and private recovery assets must not be published. Recovery readiness remains unproven.

blockedClaims: Sample d1 is proven to be equivalent to hwSample.
The owner-attested screenshot readings establish the root cause of displayed diagnostic strings.
The visual Gateway Installation List is a native VCDS export or proves physical module presence.
An unchecked Installation List address proves that related hardware is physically absent.
The captured historical state is guaranteed unchanged at a later date.
Coding or adaptation behavior not contained in the accepted evidence is confirmed.
Security Access is known, valid or required for a specific operation.
Dataset, parameterization, emergency update or SWDL operations are safe.
HNAV to HN+ conversion feasibility or barrier location is established.
notes: Source authenticity and transcription accuracy are accepted by owner attestation. No additional vehicle session is required to validate the supplied Auto-Scans, Gateway Installation List screenshots or Red/Green Menu readings. The package remains PARTIAL only because write-specific 5F backups, recovery assets and matched comparison evidence are not yet available.
